etymology.description: semantic 刂(刂) (dāo, "knife") + phonetic 害(害) (hài) -> mow
etymology.interpretation: The character 刈(yì, "mow") represents the action of cutting or mowing using a knife, with 刂(刂) (dāo, "knife") providing the semantic meaning of cutting and 害(害) (hài) providing the phonetic component.
